channel.title: Theme Camps on Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB XIV - PRESENCE AND THE ETERNAL NOW
channel.description: Recent content in Theme Camps on Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB XIV - PRESENCE AND THE ETERNAL NOW

item.title: 0 BPM
item.description: 0 BPM returns! Featuring drone and experimental improvisation performances Saturday and Sunday.

item.title: Boogie Down Lounge
item.description:
The "BOOGIE DOWN LOUNGE" is back!!

We've all been there. Feeling overwhelmed, needing a place to re-center, a place to take a breath from the festivities. WE welcome you to take that breath at the Boogie Down Lounge. Enjoy some cucumber water or some hot chai while listening to soothing melodic international inspired music. We are a bedouin-inspired chill space experience. Entering through the draped portal, you will be transported into a calming retreat, a transcendental realm that reconnects mind body and spirit.

item.title: Camp Boozehole
item.description:
Welcome to Camp Boozehole YA'LL!

This year we present you with the BOOZEHOLE SALOON!

Come on by for a ye olde rootin' tootin' raucously boozy grand old timey!! Serving you hooch (and wild west vibes) all weekend long.

Bring your A game to GET THE BOOT! and we'll be happy to kick you out of our watering hole with a thematic toss through the saloon doors!! (seriously … we want to throw your a** out)

item.title: Camp Campfire!
item.description:
Camp Campfire!

We serve up sweet AND savory smores! We will also have a SCOUT PARADE where we dress in scout gear and hand out merit badges and possible gift rubber chickens.

item.title: Camp Utopianist Project
item.description: Saturday night will be liquid funk showcase with Arrow Chrome. We will also have other DJs, our friend Jon does a great UK garage set and my other buddy Al will do nu-reggae and dance hall. On Friday night I will do a happy house set. We will also do a workshop on the Utopianist Project (https://utopianistproject.org/) We will also have a massage table and offer 6-handed massages and have games such as chess and corn-hole.

item.title: Digital Native
item.description: By day, chill vibes, shade, coffee, and live performances. Parties and cozy campfires at night except for Sunday where the party is at brunch. We have a stage featuring a curated lineup of DJs who are also our friends. This year we are debuting a new handmade custom Function None™ sound system for your dancing pleasure and have a new synchronized LED installation for your looking at pleasure. Check our sign out front daily for DJ set times.

item.title: Lizard Lounge
item.description: Where the after hours meets the living room. Come bop ya head to the beat. Make a friend, leave with a few new favorite songs.

item.title: Synarchy Boombox
item.description: A Giant… BOOMBOX?! (Yes. Obviously.) Behold the SYNARCHY BOOMBOX— a gloriously oversized relic of rhythm, scaled up to 16 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and fully committed to the bit. This is not a sculpture pretending to be a boombox. This is a boombox that ate a sculpture and kept growing. Step inside and you’ll find yourself inside the music; sound ricocheting through the chamber, bass wrapping around your ribs, light dancing like it knows something you don’t. It’s part instrument, part environment, part friendly sonic creature. Step outside and she is projecting waves of sound and color reminding you that you are a star. Now… let’s make it misbehave With big, beautiful, irresistible, functional….. knobs. No instructions. No right answers. Just curiosity and consequence. This is not a passive listening experience. This is a playable moment. A place where strangers become collaborators. where sound becomes something you can touch. and where a giant boombox invites you to ask: What happens if I turn this? Go ahead. It’s begging for it.

item.title: This Must Be the Place
item.description: A portal disguised as a camp, nestled between the ordinary and the magical. We’re a crew of dreamers, dancers, builders, and late-night philosophers who’ve come together to create a cozy, vibrant haven at the Country Club. Our camp is about grounding in the now—through connection, joy, and just the right amount of weird. By day, find shade, chill beats, massage stations and restorative elixirs at our shady chill space, where strangers become family. When night falls… well, that’s when the magic really starts. Expect spontaneous dance parties, storytelling under the stars, and interactive art installations that ask the big questions (and answer them with glitter). We’re fully fueled by love, intention, and sensation. Whether you're stopping by for a moment or moving in for a while—if you feel it, then yes... This Must Be The Place.

item.title: Wizzard's on the Playa
item.description: Will offer pornjy lounge vibes with BassBoss sound. Bar and treats will be spontaneously served
